_comment: Polygon.io WebSocket subscription lists. Edit symbols here — no code changes needed.
_doc_stocks: T.* = trade events. ~32 US equities + ETFs. Covers major indexes (SPY/QQQ/IWM/DIA), mega-cap tech, financials, energy, consumer, commodities ETFs, and top LatAm ADRs.
_doc_forex: C.* = currency pair quotes. 13 FX pairs covering G10 + key EM (BRL, ARS, CNY, MXN, CLP).
_doc_crypto: XT.* = crypto trade events. Top 6 by market cap.
_doc_limits: Polygon free tier: 1 WS connection, unlimited symbols. If you hit rate limits, reduce the stock list first (commodities ETFs are lowest priority).
